description: The PRD synthesis skill consumes the Grounding Pack as its starting point and takes an id from the pool instead of shelling the uuid verb, falling back to reading the schemas, glossary, and ADRs by path when the pack is absent, stale, or schema-invalid.
title: execution-to-prd reads the Grounding Pack and drains the UUIDv7 pool
acceptance_criteria: execution-to-prd reads grounding-pack.json when fresh and drains a UUIDv7 from its pool
With the pack absent, stale, or invalid, execution-to-prd falls back to full tree-read and still lands a valid PRD
Src-First: the skill edit is byte-identical between src/template and the root mirror
The grounding-tax reduction is validated on a fresh cold session against a stamped Instance
